roundup.title: GLM-5.2 Lands Locally as Agent Harnesses Mature
roundup.subtitle: 开源模型本地化与编码代理工具集体升级
headline: @UnslothAI 与 @danielhanchen 同步发布 GLM-5.2 2-bit 量化版本，将模型从 1.51TB 压缩至 238GB，准确率保留约 82%，可在 256GB Mac 上本地运行。
@togethercompute 与 @hxiao 分别验证 GLM-5.2 在 Together AI 与 M3 Ultra 上的推理表现，支持 512K 上下文与 agent 循环任务，15 tps 实测速度可满足 coding 工作流。
@cursor_ai 推出 /automate 技能，@claudeai 同步上线 Artifacts 功能，均针对 agentic coding 场景提供触发器、共享页面与团队协作能力。
@ArtificialAnlys 与 @arena 发布 Agent Arena 与 AA-Briefcase 基准，Claude Fable 5 与 GLM-5.2 (Max) 分别登顶与进入前十，凸显 agent 长期知识工作评估新方向。

deepDives.title: GLM-5.2 本地量化与推理落地
deepDives.summary: GLM-5.2 成为最强开源模型，多家工具链同步支持本地与云端部署。

facts.text: Unsloth 将 GLM-5.2 从 1.51TB 压缩至 238GB，准确率保留约 82%。
facts.quote: The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size)

facts.text: M3 Ultra 本地运行 GLM-5.2，上下文 524288，实测 15 tps。

bullish.text: GLM-5.2 是目前最强开源模型

deepDives.title: Cursor 与 Claude 发布 Agent 编码新功能
deepDives.summary: 主流 coding 工具持续强化 agent 自动化与团队协作能力。

facts.text: Cursor 推出 /automate 技能，支持自然语言配置触发器与 GitHub 集成。
facts.quote: Introducing /automate, a skill for agents to set up automations for you

facts.text: Claude Code Artifacts 支持会话生成交互页面并通过私有链接共享。
facts.quote: Interactive pages built from your session... shared with your team at a private link

bullish.text: Artifacts 让团队协作与 agentic 开发效率大幅提升

bullets.text: vLLM v0.21.0 Day-0 支持 Poolside Laguna M.1 225B MoE 模型。
bullets.quote: 70-layer sparse MoE: 225B total params, 23B active per token, 256K context

bullets.text: Cloudflare Workers 推出临时账号，支持 agent 秒级部署。
Agent Arena 中 GLM-5.2 (Max) 进入前十，成功率提升 9.4%。
AA-Briefcase 基准 Claude Fable 5 Elo 1587 领先。
bullets.quote: Claude Fable 5 leads with an Elo score of 1587

talentMoves.text: Noam Shazeer 从 Google DeepMind 加入 OpenAI，John Jumper 从 Google DeepMind 加入 Anthropic。

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: GLM-5.2 2-bit 版本压缩 84% 后仍保留 82% 准确率，可在 Mac 本地运行。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 最强开源模型首次实现消费级硬件本地部署

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: 推出 /automate 技能，让 agent 自动配置触发器与 GitHub 集成。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 编码代理自动化进入实用阶段

topTweets.author: @ArtificialAnlys
topTweets.text: 发布 AA-Briefcase agent 知识工作基准，Claude Fable 5 领先。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 长周期 agent 评估新标准诞生

takeaways: GLM-5.2 量化后可在 Mac 上本地运行，agent 开发可优先考虑开源模型降低成本。
Cursor /automate 与 Claude Artifacts 同时发布，团队级 agentic coding 工作流已成熟。
Agent Arena 与 AA-Briefcase 等新基准出现，需关注 agent 长期任务评估指标。
vLLM 与 Cloudflare Workers 持续优化 agent runtime， infra 层部署门槛持续降低。

items.author: @dexhorthy
items.text: I remember when the first sonnet 4.5 model came out and I gave it the same MAX_THINKING_TOKENS as I was using for opus 4.1 and it would reliably think its way into a crash out every other turn
items.whyItMatters: 实测 Claude Sonnet 4.5 与 Opus 4.1 思考 token 差异，提示模型稳定性调优要点。

items.author: @dkundel
items.text: Nice! @maddiedreese time for vanity codex domain and a gallery of random things you put Codex on 😂 it's getting hard to keep track
items.whyItMatters: Codex 在老 Palm PDA 上运行演示，展示 AI coding 工具跨设备潜力。

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: GLM-5.2 on Together AI is showing up fast on @OpenRouter ⚡️ The model is strong, and our serving path makes that strength usable in the loop.
items.whyItMatters: Together AI 优化 GLM-5.2 推理速度，支持长上下文 coding 与 agent 工作负载。

items.author: @fchollet
items.text: The more you embrace AI, the more you need SaaS. This is not obvious to armchair market analysts who love disruption narratives, but it is obvious to people actually running companies.
items.whyItMatters: Agentic 时代下 SaaS 平台价值提升而非被取代。

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Investors have increasingly framed AI networking as a binary debate between copper and optics... Copper and optics serve different but complementary roles. Nvidia’s approach has been consistent: use copper where they can, and optics where they must.
items.whyItMatters: AI 集群网络铜缆 vs 光模块互补分析，指导硬件选型。

items.author: @emollick
items.text: The interaction between AI & past scholarly work is going to get weird. Here I gave GPT-5.5 Pro a copy of my first published paper from grad school & asked it to find errors and update it. It found new data, analyzed it, created reproducible files, extended the key argument...
items.whyItMatters: AI 自动更新学术论文的潜力

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: No technology has been adopted as rapidly across the tech industry as coding harnesses w AI agents...
items.whyItMatters: AI coding harnesses adoption速度远超以往，工程师需关注

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: 6️⃣ Things to Know about AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 - It’s bigger than all previous AIEs - 4x Larger Expo with 4 Expo stages - Researchers: Poster sessions & Poaster sessions - AI Leadership: Token Billionaires & Off the Record...
items.whyItMatters: AI Engineer 2026 世界大会规模升级

items.author: @hxiao
items.text: Finally GLM5.2 locally on my M3 Ultra! Smoke test 15tps. ... hf download unsloth/GLM-5.2-GGUF ... llama-server --model ... --ctx-size 524288
items.whyItMatters: M3 Ultra本地跑GLM-5.2，512K上下文实测15tps

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text:
build an open research Hermes agent that can analyze competitors by buying their products

let it map competitor flows from signup to paid + nuture with its own purchase power

send this blueprint to your agent and add a card, it will subscribe to your competitors and map the whole flow for you
items.whyItMatters: 展示可自主付费分析竞品的 Agent 工作流，降低手动调研成本。

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text:
ICYMI 👀: Users can now search for @imagine images and videos on Grok! 

It works like a proper image search but scoped to your Imagine creations. I wish we have it across the whole set of published Grok images eventually - that would be huge!
items.whyItMatters: Grok 新增 Imagine 内容搜索功能，提升 AI 生成内容的可发现性。

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: The AI transfer portal is heating up! Several major moves this week: Noam Shazeer | Google DeepMind → OpenAI; John Jumper | Google DeepMind → Anthropic.
items.whyItMatters: 顶级 AI 人才流动反映行业竞争格局变化。

items.author: @github
items.text: With new generally available features in GitHub Copilot CLI, you can now ➡️ Speak to Copilot using on-device speech-to-text models ➡️ Use built-in Rubber Duck agent to help find blind spots with a second model
items.whyItMatters: Copilot CLI 新增语音与 Rubber Duck agent，提升开发效率。

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: Over the last two weeks, both the U.S. Government and Anthropic took significant actions that demonstrated their power to control access to AI by restricting what others can do with frontier models. ... accelerating many businesses’ and nation states’ efforts to ensure reliable access to AI...
items.whyItMatters: AI 访问限制加速主权与开源需求

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Deploy local coding agents directly on your laptop with Google Gemma open models → https://discord.com/invite/ahGXGZDw?event=1514645144786309233&utm_source=dev_eco&utm_medium=online_discord Join Ian Ballantyne and Gus Martins from the Gemma team to learn about: 💻 Offline execution setups ⚡ On-device robotic actions 📈
items.whyItMatters: Gemma本地coding agents部署，AI工程师可快速上手离线Agent开发

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: Today we're rolling out Temporary Accounts on Cloudflare Workers. Any agent can now run wrangler deploy — temporary and get a live Worker in seconds. https://blog.cloudflare.com/temporary-accounts/
items.whyItMatters: 临时账号让Agent秒级部署Worker，加速agentic infra实验

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: open models are having **another** moment! GLM-5.2 is remarkably good i've been using it with deepagents code (dcode), our coding agent built on our open harness.
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型与 LangChain 代理框架集成案例。

items.author: @AskPerplexity
items.text: Introducing the Computer Command Panel. Type / to see every mode and skill available in Computer, including Deep Research and Plan Mode. Live now on the web for all Computer users.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity Computer 新增命令面板与深度研究模式

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: We just released Omnigent 0.2 with a ton of improvements from the past 5 days! ... Major additions are @cursor_ai CLI and @antigravity harnesses, lots of new sandbox providers, and secret-free sandboxing via API proxy.
items.whyItMatters: Omnigent 0.2发布，新增Cursor CLI与harness，Agent开发利器

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Jensen Huang’s simplest explanation of an AI agent: a worker in a workshop. The model thinks. The harness gives it form. Tools and skills let it act. And the runtime gives the agent a place to get work done.
items.whyItMatters: Jensen 简明阐述 AI Agent 架构，指导 infra 与 workflow 设计

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: For families facing rare genetic diseases, answers can be hard to find. @HallieJackson spoke live with @_perloj and Dr. Catherine Brownstein about the new NEJM AI paper and our work with Boston Children’s Hospital, where experts used o3 Deep Research to help diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children.
items.whyItMatters: o3 Deep Research 辅助罕见病诊断，真实医疗落地案例

items.author: @mathemagic1an
items.text: Great writeup. GLM-5.2 pushes the frontier in design Gets high quality outputs by adhering to a small set of design systems and generating intricate outputs HTML artifact generation is very amenable to subagents.
items.whyItMatters: GLM-5.2 设计能力突破，subagent 工作流新方向

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We trained models with reinforcement learning on realistic conversations to reinforce beneficial traits like truthfulness, humility under uncertainty, openness to correction, fairness, and concern for human welfare, across 12 domains... A small amount of this data produced broad gains... improved on 44 of 53 independen
items.whyItMatters: 对齐训练实现跨域泛化，44/53评测提升

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Frontier Red Team blog: Phase 2 of Project Fetch... Opus 4.7, on its own, was ~20x faster than last year's best human team aided by Opus 4.1.
items.whyItMatters: Claude编程机器人狗20倍提速，Agent能力实测

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Introducing /automate, a skill for agents to set up automations for you. Describe your task in plain language. Cursor configures the triggers, instructions, and tools. We've also added GitHub triggers... plus computer use for cloud agents.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor新增/automate与云Agent，编码自动化升级

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: Announcing AA-Briefcase, the benchmark for the next era of agentic knowledge work... Claude Fable 5 leads with an Elo score of 1587... GLM-5.2 (max) at 1266. Top performer satisfies all rubric criteria on just 3% of tasks.
items.whyItMatters: 新长周期Agent知识工作基准，Claude Fable 5领先

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 Congrats to @poolsideai on Laguna M.1... Day-0 support landed in vLLM v0.21.0. 70-layer sparse MoE: 225B total params, 23B active per token, 256K context. Native interleaved reasoning between tool calls.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM v0.21.0即刻支持Poolside Laguna M.1 MoE模型

items.author: @arena
items.text: Agent Arena has been live for 2 weeks... GLM-5.2 (Max) enters the top 10. The strongest open-weight result... +9.4% confirmed success... Claude Fable 5 debuted at #1... before the U.S. government directive to suspend access.
items.whyItMatters: Agent Arena新榜：GLM-5.2开源最强，Claude Fable 5曾居首

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Introducing Brain in Computer. Brain is a continuously learning memory system. Every task on Computer plugs into a context graph built by Brain. It makes Computer more stateful with every run. Available as a research preview for all Perplexity Max subscribers.
items.whyItMatters: Agent memory system boosts correctness 25%, recall 16% with full context transparency.

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: New in Claude Code: Artifacts. Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link. Available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Session-aware shared artifacts improve team AI coding workflows and context sharing.

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: Instead of assuming AI will always do what we intend, we ask: what if it doesn't? That’s why we’ve developed our AI Control Roadmap: a framework for building and managing the advanced AI we deploy within Google.
items.whyItMatters: New multi-agent security framework for labs/gov/academia collaboration.

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally!🔥 The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac or RAM/VRAM setups. GLM-5.2 is the strongest open model to date.
items.whyItMatters: Enables local inference of top open frontier model with massive size reduction.

items.author: @cognition
items.text: Every PR you open in Devin Review now gets a security review. Each finding is ranked by severity, tagged with a CWE ID, and comes with a fix drafted as a merge-ready pull request.
items.whyItMatters: AI agent adds automated security reviews with CWE tags and PR fixes.

items.author: @llama_index
items.text: LiteParse v2.1 is here, and its bringing the fastest markdown output possible. In this release, we are fulfilling our top request: markdown output. But in the spirit of "lite"-ness, we are doing this completely LLM-free and fast. ... beats all other model-free competitors in 3 separate benchmark datasets.
items.whyItMatters: LLM-free fast markdown parsing beats competitors on benchmarks for agent data pipelines.

items.author: @cohere
items.text: We just dropped three updates that make North Mini Code more accessible than ever ⬇️ The 4-bit quant is now available, making our first open-source agentic coding model small enough to be run on a Mac. Get the weights here: https://huggingface.co/CohereLabs/North-Mini-Code-1.0-w4a16
items.whyItMatters: 开源 agentic coding 模型更新，支持本地运行与量化。

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: Learn how @aisquaredai & @domynai used Olmo, our family of fully open language models, to build their own models for regulated industries like finance, healthcare, & the public sector.
items.whyItMatters: 全开源模型 Olmo 在合规行业落地案例与数据集贡献。

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: My @Google colleagues ... recently wrote a paper ... "Google's Training Supercomputers from TPU v2 to Ironwood: Architectural Stability, Scale, Resilience, Power Efficiency, and Sustainability Across Five Generations". ... ~30X more energy efficient per flop.
items.whyItMatters: TPU 五代演进：30x 能效提升

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Build secure agentic workflows without iframe lag. Combining Agent to User Interface and Model Context Protocol Apps balances native rendering with custom iframe flexibility. 🛠️ https://developers.googleblog.com/a2ui-and-mcp-apps/
items.whyItMatters: A2UI+MCP新架构，安全高效构建Agentic workflow

items.author: @fal
items.text: Rodin v2.5 is now live on fal! -PBR materials and HD textures -Production-ready 3D from text or up to 5 reference images -Quality tiers from 50K to 2M triangles, backgrounds to hero assets
items.whyItMatters: Rodin v2.5 3D生成升级，支持PBR与多图参考，生产级输出

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Paper review: You Don’t Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences https://temporal-difference-vision.github.io/ https://temporal-difference-vision.github.io/static/pdfs/tdv.pdf @AlexiGlad @ninaddaithankar
items.whyItMatters: Carmack深度解析视频时序表征学习论文，少先验大数据路线

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: PPO had a second wave in the LLM era for reasons unanticipated by the original paper - the importance-ratio objective fixes biases from numeric error, async training, and forward pass noise - the clipping objective affects entropy through a mechanism that we didn't know about at the time of publication (DAPO,
items.whyItMatters: PPO在LLM时代意外复兴，揭示RLHF核心机制新洞见

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M is a surprisingly reliable smart tool selector. We gave it 151 tools, and it consistently surfaces the 5 most relevant ones based on the user prompt. This saves tokens and improves accuracy. Ideal for hmmmm agentic edge models? 👀
items.whyItMatters: 350M 模型高效工具选择，降低 agent token 成本

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: someone asked if they could try getting Laguna M.1 running on a Mac. we said yes. they came back with a 3-bit MLX build running locally on Apple Silicon: ~26 tok/s, with ~100 GB peak memory on an M3 Max with 128 GB unified.
items.whyItMatters: Laguna M.1 本地 Mac 运行，agentic coding 实用进展

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Artifacts are now live in Claude Code. Ask Claude to turn what it's working on into a page and send the link to your team. The page updates as the session keeps working. Available today on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 新增 Artifacts 功能，提升团队协作与 agentic 开发效率。

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: New research published in @Nature with @GoogleDeepMind shows how AMIE utilizes long-context capabilities of Gemini models to ground its clinical reasoning in authoritative medical knowledge.
items.whyItMatters: AMIE 在 Nature 发表，展示 Gemini 长上下文在纵向疾病管理中的医师级表现。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: New lab: Cost Simulator A simple tool for looking at your real-world traffic and estimating cost savings with different models, using median endpoint pricing
items.whyItMatters: 实时流量成本模拟器，帮助优化多模型推理预算。

items.author: @bcherny
items.text: New in Claude Code: Artifacts. Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link. Available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 新功能提升协作效率

items.author: @_lewtun
items.text: ML Intern is out of beta! ... ML Intern has been used over 12,000 times to create hundreds of models and datasets on the HF Hub. ... powered by GLM-5.2, the world's best model on PostTrainBench.
items.whyItMatters: HF 开源 Agent 自动化 post-training

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally! The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac or RAM/VRAM setups. GLM-5.2 is the strongest open model to date.
items.whyItMatters: 最强开源模型 GLM-5.2 本地运行

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: Llama.cpp has a new branding + official website. Run local models today! Now more than ever, open source must win. 🙏
items.whyItMatters: llama.cpp 品牌升级，促进本地开源模型部署。

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: New on the Runway API: Recipes. Drop production-ready generative media features into your platform, with one API call.
items.whyItMatters: Runway API 新增 Recipes，简化生成媒体集成。

items.author: @wandb
items.text: We just opened it up for anyone to try. It's an early experiment and still a little rough, so if your team runs more than one coding agent, kick the tires and tell us what's useful and what's missing. Signup: https://hivemind.wandb.tools/ GitHub: https://github.com/wandb/hivemind
items.whyItMatters: 多 coding agent 协作平台开放测试

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Sonic-3.5 is also the #1 streaming TTS model on @voicearena_ai for notable languages including English🇺🇸, Hindi 🇮🇳, Portuguese 🇧🇷
items.whyItMatters: Cartesia Sonic-3.5 登顶 Voice Arena 流式 TTS 多语言榜首，语音 Agent 首选。

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text: For WWDC, we worked with Apple to run Kimi K2.6, a 1T-parameter model, across a cluster of four Mac Studios using a preview version of LM Studio. We showcased secure remote access from a MacBook Neo and iPhone using LM Link. A glimpse of your own private, frontier-scale AI.
items.whyItMatters: 演示1T参数模型在Mac集群本地运行，边缘推理新标杆

items.author: @Alibaba_Qwen
items.text: 📣 Introducing the Qwen-Robot Suite — Qwen-RobotNav, Qwen-RobotManip, Qwen-RobotWorld, three foundation models, a full stack for embodied intelligence. ... Together, they form the low-level toolkit for general-purpose agentic systems that don't just see the world, but act in it.
items.whyItMatters: Open embodied AI stack unifying navigation, manipulation, world models for agents.

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Sakana AI research scientist Rujikorn (Tan) Charakorn recently presented Doc-to-LoRA at @MLCollective’s DLCT journal club, covering hypernetworks, cost amortization, and future directions.
items.whyItMatters: Hypernetwork 实现文档到 LoRA 即时适配，降低模型定制门槛。

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: create android apps in ai studio and run them on your phone a quick step-by-step guide by @patloeber:
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 直接生成并运行 Android 应用，加速原型开发。

items.author: @joshwoodward
items.text: 🇧🇷World-changing AI companies are coming from Brazil. That’s why we’ve officially expanded our Google AI Futures Fund to Brazil, partnering with venture capital leader Monashees to launch the Gama Fund.
items.whyItMatters: Google 扩展 AI 基金至巴西，支持新兴市场开发者。

items.author: @jonasgeiping
items.text: We recently updated Claudini (our autoresearch test where agents autonomously improve jailbreak algorithms), no fable results for now (...), but surprisingly Kimi-2.6 has entirely caught up, surpassing Opus 4.6 on this task.
items.whyItMatters: Claudini 测试显示 Kimi 模型在越狱攻击上追平前沿水平。

items.author: @arimorcos
items.text: Most companies that say they want to own their model are going to fail at it. ... The future worth betting on isn't three labs renting the same model to everyone. It's thousands of companies building their own domain-specific models...
items.whyItMatters: 讨论自建领域模型 vs 租用前沿模型的趋势
